title: Thanks For Using Kutu's Bot Panel.
message: Happy botting and have fun impressing people with your cool formations!

title: Copy Avatar Problem
message: Copy Avatar feature won't work if your bot's account location is in a different country

title: Report Bugs To Owner
message: You should report all the bugs you encounter to the owner.

title: Don't forget this one
message: Sometimes roblox ratelimits the accounts you use for botting. Preventing you from joining the server. In that case theres nothing you can do but to wait it out until the ratelimit goes away.

title: Added new orbit axes (x,y,z)
message: the commands are orbx orby orbz

title: Note to you that..
message: this panel only works with multi instance executors.
